message.content:
@startuml
participant client
participant fastAPI
participant JobsCollection
participant Poller
participant IngestService
participant MappingIngestor
participant MongoSerializer
participant DatabrokerCollections
participant SciCatIngestor
participant Catamel

client ->> fastAPI : file ready to ingest
fastAPI ->> JobsCollection : create Job
Poller ->> JobsCollection : poll for job
Poller ->> IngestService : ingest
IngestService ->> MappingIngestor : ingest
MappingIngestor ->> MongoSerializer : send docs
MongoSerializer ->> DatabrokerCollections : Persist docstream
IngestService ->> SciCatIngestor : ingest
SciCatIngestor ->> Catamel : many messages
@enduml
